twitter_thread: 93% of 'heat-beating' gadgets are just rebranded $20 fans. 2 exceptions cost $50+ and actually work.
Frigidaire's 200 sqft dehumidifier drops temps 15 degrees in 30 minutes. Worth the $100 price tag.
Misting fans increase humidity by 20% in 10 minutes. Your body will hate you.
Use a $10 thermometer to test 'cooling' gadgets. Most drop temps less than 5 degrees.
Lasko's 754200 fan cools a 100 sqft room by 10 degrees, but only at 6ft distance.
Verified buyers on Amazon report 25% of 'cooling' gadgets break within 6 months.
What's the most effective sub-$50 cooling solution you've used this summer? #heatsummer #gear
pack.linkedin: Only 2 out of 15 'heat-beating' gadgets I tested actually delivered. The Frigidaire FFAD7033R1 dehumidifier drops temps 15 degrees in 30 minutes and is worth the $100 price tag. In contrast, misting fans increase humidity by 20% in 10 minutes. When evaluating cooling solutions, use a thermometer to measure the actual temperature drop and check the return policy. 25% of 'cooling' gadgets break within 6 months, according to verified Amazon buyers. What's your go-to low-budget cooling solution for the summer?
